title: Compile/Coverage Contract → Artifact Checks

implemented: source-level contract/artifact reference checks in ordo compile
confirmed contract to artifact mapping checks in ordo coverage
CLI regression tests for unknown fields and missing mappings
book source Markdown update without PDF regeneration
not_implemented_in_this_slice: run-state confirmed/candidate semantic validation beyond existing validate-state

checks.repo_check: passed with PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 after cache cleanup

known_limitations: M46.2 validates declared mappings only; it does not inspect rendered artifact content.
M46.2 coverage checks source-level confirmed contracts, not full run-state status transitions.
Full validate-artifacts, consistency and go-no-go remain future M46 slices.
